overall.description: A slow, atmospheric first-person walk through a foggy forest at night, alongside a wooden cabin. The scene features heavy mist, tall pine trees, and a wooden walkway, rendered in a cinematic game engine with a distinctive blue-green color grade typical of horror or survival games.

weathered wooden planks forming a narrow path through the forest floor
thick mist obscuring the distant forest and creating low visibility atmosphere
silhouetted tree line visible through the heavy fog in the background

segments.scene_description: The camera moves slowly forward along a wooden walkway in a dense, foggy forest at night. A traditional wooden cabin stands to the right, partially visible in the darkness, while tall pine trees loom overhead. The scene is enveloped in thick mist with a cool blue-green color cast, creating an eerie, atmospheric environment with no other visible characters or movement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, steady progression through a dense, nocturnal forest that maintains a heavy, oppressive atmosphere. It begins with a forward movement along a weathered wooden walkway, where the surrounding environment is shrouded in thick, clinging mist. As the camera advances, a traditional wooden cabin emerges partially from the darkness on the right, framed by the towering silhouettes of pine trees overhead. The scene remains enveloped in a cool blue-green color cast, deepening the eerie mood as the camera continues its solitary path into the fog.
